items.title: Apple's Newest Phone and Laptop Are More Budget-Friendly. Premium Products Could Be Next
items.description: Apple's latest product strategy isn't about new technology. It's about being more—and less—affordable.

items.title: German Publishers Urge Antitrust Action Against Apple
items.description: Industry groups say proposed app tracking changes fail to resolve competition concerns.

items.title: Qualcomm Stock Tumbles -- BofA Warns on Apple Exit and Weak Growth
items.description: Qualcomm Stock Falls After BofA Warns of Weak Growth Ahead

items.title: Qualcomm faces loss of Apple business, competitive pressures, says Bank of America
items.description: Analysts at Bank of America reinstated coverage of Qualcomm Inc (NASDAQ:QCOM, XETRA:QCI) on Tuesday with an ‘Underperform’ rating and a $145 price target, pointing to modest long-term growth expectations and several competitive and customer-related headwinds. Shares of Qualcomm traded hands...

items.title: Apple’s Budget MacBook Is a Hit. What It Means For the Stock, and What’s Next.
items.description: Apple reported December quarter product gross margins of 40.7% in January. Analysts surveyed by FactSet expect product gross margins for the December 2026 quarter to be 40.6%.
